textByHashes.ae602168a7788aeb1df2a915124160bb53d649c6: You are wrong this time, adventurer. I'm actually from Ice Mountain.
textByHashes.1da6bc5c00ab5c7e717fc3874d26c4784edac455: I always wanted to visit Lovakengj to see the Blast Mine. This year I finally saved up enough to travel here.
textByHashes.fa870af83ec452458e5c4362e838e2ce80673f73: However, the war with the lizardmen means Lovakengj is dangerous to get to from here. I'll need to go the long way round.
textByHashes.050da6fd3e7d40805b589b7cc20d591a8d7550f0: To be honest, Shayzien is a bit boring for visitors. It's all about war and military things.
textByHashes.5c0efd9a8bd2de06af09952abb6056247a89715f: The only place I would recommend is the Cloak and Stagger. You'll find some pretty good drinks there.
